creator: @sethgolie
transcript: We're craving chicken, let's hit up Raising Cane's. Yeah man, I'll get the four tenders naked and then we'll get coleslaw, no toast, no fries and a Coke Zero. Okay, but what if we went to Popeyes, what would you order there? Yeah, I'd get the three blackened chicken tenders with the green beans and a Coke Zero. Dude, how do you always know what to order to stay on track with your fitness journey? Bro, you're not following Seth G yet? Shit, I better follow Seth G right now.
caption: Comment FASTFOOD for my fast food swap cheat sheet. Steal these two orders from Raising Canes & Popeyes. Raising Cane's order: 4 strips NAKED + coleslaw (no fries no toast) + Louisiana hot sauce + Coke Zero (395 calories 53 G protein). Popeyes order: 3 Blackened tenders + green beans + Coke Zero (430 calories 38 G protein). Both these orders will save you well over 1000 calories. Follow @sethgolie for fast food swaps.
ocr_summary: Raising Cane's: Original 1430 cal/54g protein, Swap 395 cal/53g protein. Popeyes: Original 1290 cal/34g protein, Swap 430 cal/38g protein.

swaps.original_meal: Standard Raising Cane's combo (fried chicken fingers with fries, toast, and regular Coke)
swaps.swap_meal: 4 strips NAKED + coleslaw, no fries, no toast, Louisiana hot sauce, Coke Zero

swaps.original_meal: Standard Popeyes combo (fried chicken with fries and regular Coke)
swaps.swap_meal: 3 Blackened chicken tenders + green beans + Coke Zero

parsed.notes: Two swaps in one reel. Raising Cane's saves ~1035 cal. Popeyes saves ~860 cal. Both maintain solid protein.
